## Summary

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run android:debug`

## Security

- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added
- [ ] Dependency changes are intentional
- [ ] Any user-facing HTML is sanitized
